Q_main_distbin: SELECT 'summary_completed_foreclosure' c, CAST(`summary_completed_foreclosure` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure GROUP BY `summary_completed_foreclosure` UNION ALL SELECT 'summary_contested_litigation' c, CAST(`summary_contested_litigation` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure GROUP BY `summary_contested_litigation` UNION ALL SELECT 'summary_current_step' c, CAST(`summary_current_step` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure GROUP BY `summary_current_step` UNION ALL SELECT 'summary_foreclosure_attorney' c, CAST(`summary_foreclosure_attorney` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure GROUP BY `summary_foreclosure_attorney` UNION ALL SELECT 'summary_judicial_foreclosure' c, CAST(`summary_judicial_foreclosure` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure GROUP BY `summary_judicial_foreclosure` UNION ALL SELECT 'summary_last_step_completed' c, CAST(`summary_last_step_completed` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure GROUP BY `summary_last_step_completed` ORDER BY c, n DESC;

Q_main_numeric: SELECT 'bid_approval_bid_amount' c, COUNT(*) total, COUNT(`bid_approval_bid_amount`) nn, CAST(MIN(`bid_approval_bid_amount`) AS CHAR) mn, CAST(MAX(`bid_approval_bid_amount`) AS CHAR) mx, CAST(ROUND(AVG(`bid_approval_bid_amount`),2) AS CHAR) avg FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure UNION ALL SELECT 'summary_days_in_fcl' c, COUNT(*) total, COUNT(`summary_days_in_fcl`) nn, CAST(MIN(`summary_days_in_fcl`) AS CHAR) mn, CAST(MAX(`summary_days_in_fcl`) AS CHAR) mx, CAST(ROUND(AVG(`summary_days_in_fcl`),2) AS CHAR) avg FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure UNION ALL SELECT 'summary_foreclosure_bid_amount' c, COUNT(*) total, COUNT(`summary_foreclosure_bid_amount`) nn, CAST(MIN(`summary_foreclosure_bid_amount`) AS CHAR) mn, CAST(MAX(`summary_foreclosure_bid_amount`) AS CHAR) mx, CAST(ROUND(AVG(`summary_foreclosure_bid_amount`),2) AS CHAR) avg FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure UNION ALL SELECT 'summary_foreclosure_sale_amount' c, COUNT(*) total, COUNT(`summary_foreclosure_sale_amount`) nn, CAST(MIN(`summary_foreclosure_sale_amount`) AS CHAR) mn, CAST(MAX(`summary_foreclosure_sale_amount`) AS CHAR) mx, CAST(ROUND(AVG(`summary_foreclosure_sale_amount`),2) AS CHAR) avg FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure UNION ALL SELECT 'summary_sms_days_in_fcl' c, COUNT(*) total, COUNT(`summary_sms_days_in_fcl`) nn, CAST(MIN(`summary_sms_days_in_fcl`) AS CHAR) mn, CAST(MAX(`summary_sms_days_in_fcl`) AS CHAR) mx, CAST(ROUND(AVG(`summary_sms_days_in_fcl`),2) AS CHAR) avg FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure;
Q_main_idtext: SELECT 'loanid' c, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(x SEPARATOR ' | ') FROM (SELECT `loanid` x FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure WHERE `loanid` IS NOT NULL AND `loanid`!='' LIMIT 5) t) v UNION ALL SELECT 'summary_servicer_number' c, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(x SEPARATOR ' | ') FROM (SELECT `summary_servicer_number` x FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure WHERE `summary_servicer_number` IS NOT NULL AND `summary_servicer_number`!='' LIMIT 5) t) v;
Q_hold_dist: SELECT 'description' c, CAST(`description` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure_hold GROUP BY `description` ORDER BY c, n DESC;
Q_hold_date: SELECT 'description_end_date' c, COUNT(*) total, COUNT(`description_end_date`) nn, CAST(MIN(`description_end_date`) AS CHAR) mn, CAST(MAX(`description_end_date`) AS CHAR) mx FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure_hold UNION ALL SELECT 'description_start_date' c, COUNT(*) total, COUNT(`description_start_date`) nn, CAST(MIN(`description_start_date`) AS CHAR) mn, CAST(MAX(`description_start_date`) AS CHAR) mx FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure_hold;
Q_lm_dist: SELECT 'borrower_intentions' c, CAST(`borrower_intentions` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure_loss_mitigation GROUP BY `borrower_intentions` UNION ALL SELECT 'deal' c, CAST(`deal` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure_loss_mitigation GROUP BY `deal` UNION ALL SELECT 'denialreason' c, CAST(`denialreason` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure_loss_mitigation GROUP BY `denialreason` UNION ALL SELECT 'final_disposition' c, CAST(`final_disposition` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure_loss_mitigation GROUP BY `final_disposition` UNION ALL SELECT 'imminent_default' c, CAST(`imminent_default` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure_loss_mitigation GROUP BY `imminent_default` UNION ALL SELECT 'lmc_status' c, CAST(`lmc_status` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure_loss_mitigation GROUP BY `lmc_status` UNION ALL SELECT 'program' c, CAST(`program` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure_loss_mitigation GROUP BY `program` UNION ALL SELECT 'single_point_of_contact' c, CAST(`single_point_of_contact` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure_loss_mitigation GROUP BY `single_point_of_contact` ORDER BY c, n DESC;
Q_lm_date: SELECT 'cycle_closed_date' c, COUNT(*) total, COUNT(`cycle_closed_date`) nn, CAST(MIN(`cycle_closed_date`) AS CHAR) mn, CAST(MAX(`cycle_closed_date`) AS CHAR) mx FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure_loss_mitigation UNION ALL SELECT 'cycle_opened_date' c, COUNT(*) total, COUNT(`cycle_opened_date`) nn, CAST(MIN(`cycle_opened_date`) AS CHAR) mn, CAST(MAX(`cycle_opened_date`) AS CHAR) mx FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure_loss_mitigation;
Q_bk_dist: SELECT 'bankruptcy_status' c, CAST(`bankruptcy_status` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure_bankruptcy GROUP BY `bankruptcy_status` UNION ALL SELECT 'chapter' c, CAST(`chapter` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure_bankruptcy GROUP BY `chapter` UNION ALL SELECT 'legal_status' c, CAST(`legal_status` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_loan_foreclosure_bankruptcy GROUP BY `legal_status` ORDER BY c, n DESC;

Q_stage_dist: SELECT 'stage' c, CAST(`stage` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_fcl_stage_info GROUP BY `stage` UNION ALL SELECT 'state' c, CAST(`state` AS CHAR) v, COUNT(*) n FROM bpms.sync_fcl_stage_info GROUP BY `state` ORDER BY c, n DESC;
